title: baccharis decussata subsp. jelskii
intro: Baccharis decussata subsp. jelskii, also known as Jelski's Baccharis, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting against infections. Baccharis decussata subsp. jelskii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
